what: A repo-linked command that shapes how the work loop runs — a question nexus (fixed question set fired at a variable artifact) plus its charter and proofs.
why: The work loop and its utilities are themselves precipitate of the loop (process artifacts); they need the same intent+proof discipline as any component. Skills are links into the repo, not copies — one source of truth, no sync.
prove_gate: derivation gate — cairnmap recompiles green: this skill renders from its intention+why.json AND no charter-less command renders. (Currently an IOU: cairnmap not built.)
extra_gates: the cairnmap recompile-gate is the skill class's distinguishing extra gate — a skill does not ship until the help that indexes it is current.
kicks_back_on: cairnmap incomplete (skill missing from the help, or a help entry with no charter) → red → fix the charter at source (the charter is the help).
provenance: first non-trivial node-class exercised; defined 2026-07-15 as the skill roster was built.
